overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a coastal pier at sunset in a video game environment (GTA V style). The camera moves from the bustling pier boardwalk past the Pier Cafe, transitions down to the beach, and walks along the sandy shore toward the ocean as sailboats drift by during a golden hour sunset.

white painted benches facing the ocean
flags on poles along the pier railing

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden planks of a coastal pier during golden hour. The Pier Cafe building dominates the left side while wooden planters line the right. The city skyline is visible in the distance, and a few pedestrians stroll or sit on benches enjoying the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: ramp leading from pier down to beach level

events.description: camera turns left and descends from pier boardwalk toward beach level

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking down the ramp from the pier to the sandy beach area

notable_agents.action: man walking on the sand near the water's edge

entered.detail: expansive sandy beach stretching toward the water
calm ocean surface reflecting the sunset
distant mountains visible beyond the beach

segments.scene_description: The camera pivots left and descends a ramp from the pier deck down toward the beach. The Pier Cafe building shifts to the right side of the frame as the sandy beach and ocean come into view. A lone pedestrian walks along the shoreline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline at sunset with pier structure

agents.ego_description: walking across the sand toward the ocean shoreline, passing coin-operated viewers

notable_agents.action: group of people playing near the water's edge

entered.detail: wooden pier extending over the water with support pillars
white sailboats with full sails drifting on the ocean
blue coin-operated telescopic viewers on stands

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sandy beach toward the water's edge during a vibrant sunset. The wooden pier structure extends over the ocean on the left, while sailboats drift peacefully in the center of the frame. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting a warm golden glow across the sand and water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling wooden pier boardwalk down to a serene, sun-drenched shoreline at sunset. It begins by gliding along wooden planks past the Pier Cafe and planters, with the distant city skyline framing the horizon. As the camera pivots left, it descends a ramp from the deck, shifting the cafe to the right as the sandy beach and open ocean gradually reveal themselves. The scene then opens onto the sand, moving toward the water's edge while the pier structure recedes to the left. Finally, the view expands across the shoreline toward drifting sailboats, all bathed in the warm golden glow of the sun sitting low on the horizon.
